name: United Way Center for Financial Stability
description_short: United Way Center for Financial Stability is a free credit assistance provider based in Miami, Florida. Rated 4.7/5 with 14 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
United Way Center for Financial Stability is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Miami, Florida. Carrying a 4.7/5.0 Google rating from 14 reviews, United Way Center for Financial Stability has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Miami area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Operating as a financial consultant, financial planner, tax consultant, United Way Center for Financial Stability provides a range of services for consumers seeking free credit assistance solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Miami offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. United Way Center for Financial Stability provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Miami, Florida area who are considering United Way Center for Financial Stability should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
